mission.title: external-secrets: Support cluster-scoped generators (specifically Password)
mission.description: Support cluster-scoped generators (specifically Password). This issue affects 30+ users.

steps.title: Identify external-secrets feature symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your external-secrets deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app=external-secrets
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=external-secrets -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors related to: Support cluster-scoped generators (specifically Password)

steps.title: Check current Namespace configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant external-secrets resources:
```bash
kubectl get namespace -A
kubectl describe namespace <name> -n <namespace>
```
**Describe the solution you'd like**
I would like to declare a Password Generator that adheres to my requirements (length, complexity) once then re-use across all namespaces.

steps.title: Confirm Support cluster-scoped generators (specifically Pa is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=external-secrets -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.
